# Part 3: [TODO: Tên đề tài] — Bộ dữ liệu tự chọn

```{r p3-setup, include=FALSE}
if (!requireNamespace("here", quietly = TRUE)) install.packages("here")
source(here::here("config", "setup.R"))
knitr::opts_chunk$set(fig.align = "center")
```

```{r child=here::here("Part_3_FreeChoice","Part_1_FreeChoi_123.Rmd")}
```

```{r child=here::here("Part_3_FreeChoice","Part_2_FreeChoice_4.Rmd")}
```

```{r child=here::here("Part_3_FreeChoice","Part_3_FreeChoice_5.Rmd")}
```

```{r child=here::here("Part_3_FreeChoice","Part_4_FreeChoice_6.Rmd")}
```
